ACME CORP Q2 2024 EARNINGS CALL TRANSCRIPT

Operator: Welcome to Acme Corp's second quarter 2024 earnings call.

CEO: Thank you. Acme Corp delivered strong results this quarter. Revenue rose 12% to
$3.2 billion in Q2 2024, driven by accelerating datacenter power demand.
Net income grew 8% to $580 million in Q2 2024. Our operating margin was 18.5% in Q2 2024.

CFO: EPS came in at $4.12 for Q2 2024, beating consensus estimates.
Operating cash flow reached $720 million in Q2 2024, up from $650 million a year ago.
Total debt stood at $2.1 billion at the end of Q2 2024.

Looking ahead, we are raising our FY 2024 guidance. We now expect revenue of $12.5 billion
for FY 2024, up from prior guidance of $12.0 billion. We guide EPS to $16.50 for FY 2024.
Gross margin is expected to be approximately 42% for FY 2024 guidance.
